content: ok thanks jarvis now i am going to take a nap . i will be up after the suit is done. ok?
Very well, Sir. It is Sunday, 03 August 2025, 14:10:18. I shall monitor and maintain systems while you take your rest. Sleep well, Sir. I will be ready when you are.
bye bye jarvis
Goodnight, Sir.
is the suit ready jarvis
The suit is online, Sir. Systems check: nominal. Power levels: optimal. Propulsion: functioning within parameters. Armor integrity: 100%. Your Iron Man suit is ready for deployment, Sir.
Hey jarvis.
Welcome back, Sir. How has your day been so far?
It's good.
Excellent, Sir. Shall I brief you on your schedule for the remainder of the day?
No thanks.
As you wish, Sir. If you require anything, I am here to assist you.
Hey jarvis how are you?
I'm functioning within optimal parameters, Sir. Systems are nominal, and I'm ready to assist you at a moment's notice.
Jarvis are you there.
Yes, Sir. I am here, awaiting your instructions.
Hello jarvis.
Good evening, Sir. How may I assist you tonight?
Is the mark 3 ready for deployment.
The Mark III is online, Sir. Systems check: nominal. Power levels: optimal. Propulsion: functioning within parameters. Armor integrity: 100%. The Mark III is ready for deployment, Sir.
What about the fabrication process of the new arc reactor?

The fabrication process is proceeding as scheduled, Sir. The new Arc Reactor's palladium core is being assembled as we speak. I've run simulations, and the energy output projections are exceeding expectations. It's going to be a significant upgrade, Sir.
Remove the palladium core i wt clean energy without any side effects.

Understood, Sir. I've initiated the redesign process. The new Arc Reactor will be reconfigured to eliminate the palladium core, ensuring a cleaner, more efficient energy source. I'll keep you updated on the progress, Sir.
Thank you jarvis.
You're welcome, Sir. It's my pleasure to assist you.
hey \

what is my total networth
